languages.text: "Кого прошли?.. Мы тут уже родились. А подробности вам лучше у капитана или полковника спросить".
"Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."
languages.original_text: "Кого прошли?.. Мы тут уже родились. А подробности вам лучше у капитана или полковника спросить".

traits.locale_text: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the Captain or the Colonel."
"Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."
"All of us were born here. Our distant ancestors were requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius, and then we were abandoned here like scrap. But, against all odds, we survived."
"Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the Captain or the Colonel."
"Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."
"Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."

languages.text: 「我々は皆、ここで生まれた。遠い祖先は、シベリアンのヴァランキウスに徴用され、その後、我々は廃棄物のようにここに捨てられた。しかし、奇跡的に我々は生き延びた」
languages.original_text: "All of us were born here. Our distant ancestors were requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius, and then we were abandoned here like scrap. But, against all odds, we survived."

languages.text: "Ne geçmesi? Biz burada doğduk. Ayrıntılarıysa... Yüzbaşı ya da Albay ile konuşsanız daha iyi olur."
languages.original_text: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Ne geçmesi? Biz burada doğduk. Ayrıntılarıysa... Yüzbaşı ya da Albay ile konuşsanız daha iyi olur."

languages.text: “穿过什么？我们生下来就在这儿。至于细节，你最好去问上尉或者上校。”
languages.original_text: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."

traits.locale_text: “穿过什么？我们生下来就在这儿。至于细节，你最好去问上尉或者上校。”

languages.text: "Hä? Wir wurden hier geboren. Die Details besprecht Ihr am besten mit dem Captain oder dem Colonel."
languages.original_text: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Hä? Wir wurden hier geboren. Die Details besprecht Ihr am besten mit dem Captain oder dem Colonel."

languages.text: « Traversé quoi ? Nous sommes nés ici. Si vous voulez en savoir plus, vous feriez mieux de voir ça avec la capitaine ou le colonel. »
languages.original_text: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."

traits.locale_text: « Traversé quoi ? Nous sommes nés ici. Si vous voulez en savoir plus, vous feriez mieux de voir ça avec la capitaine ou le colonel. »

languages.text: «¿Atravesar las qué? Nacimos aquí. En cuanto a los detalles, tendrá que consultarlo con la capitana o el coronel».
languages.original_text: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."

traits.locale_text: «¿Atravesar las qué? Nacimos aquí. En cuanto a los detalles, tendrá que consultarlo con la capitana o el coronel».
